project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React frontend + Node.js/Express backend + PostgreSQL
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
test_command: No test command available - validate via build
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 2. Run backend build: cd backend && npm run build. Both should succeed without errors.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet access. No test database available for runtime validation - rely on TypeScript compilation and build checks.
key_patterns: Frontend pages use @tanstack/react-query with api.get/post calls. Backend controllers follow try/catch with next(err) pattern. PostgreSQL JSONB columns are returned as pre-parsed objects by the pg driver. Routes defined in backend/src/routes/index.ts. No error boundary exists.
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/ - all page components; frontend/src/components/ - shared components; frontend/src/services/api.ts - Axios client; backend/src/controllers/ - API controllers; backend/src/routes/index.ts - route definitions; backend/src/utils/ - seed scripts; backend/migrations/ - SQL migrations
